title: SecurityConfig (Spec 077 delta)
description: The `security` config block after Spec 077. Shows the new deep_scan group, the removed key, and back-compat aliases that migrate on load.

deep_scan.description: Opt-in heavy-scan layer. Default OFF. When disabled, only the in-process deterministic baseline runs (FR-006).

enabled.description: Master opt-in for Docker scanners + source extraction.

scanners.description: Optional per-scanner enable list under the umbrella.

x-migration.note: Old configs load unchanged: aliases map on load with identical effect; auto_scan_quarantined is ignored if present (FR-016/FR-017/SC-007).

x-unchanged.quarantine_enabled: global tri-state, default true — out of scope
